'''''Rage''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]].

==History==
While assigned to [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Wooyou Senn|Senn's]] [[Task Force Vengeance]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam sector]], it was the [[Command ship/Legends|command ship]] of a small [[Battle group/Legends|battle group]] that acted as the home of the elite [[Avenger Squadron]].

Paired with [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] ''[[Compellor]]'', the battle group possessed the capability to track down possible [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] and [[Airam (group)|Airam]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] staging areas and keep the enemy from escaping. During several missions, the enemy targeted the ''Compellor'' in order to escape into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], and it was Avenger Squadron's duty to defend both it and the ''Rage'' at all costs.

It was presumed destroyed at the [[Battle of Nocto]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
